You'll need to download Fiddler Everywhere from this github repository: [https://github.com/auto-yui-patch/fiddler-everywhere-patch-automated](https://github.com/auto-yui-patch/fiddler-everywhere-patch-automated)

* First, fork the github repository

![][image1]

* After “forking” the github repository, press the “Actions” button

![][image2]

* Press “Latest Version \- Workflow Dispatch”

![][image3]

* Press “Run workflow”

![][image4]

* After configuring those options (they are optional, except Operating System And Architecture which you must change depending on whether you use Windows or Linux), press the green button called “Run workflow”.

![][image5]

* Refresh the page a few times until you see a workflow running, then click it.

![][image6]

* After waiting for approximately 2-5 minutes for it to complete, refresh the page and click the download symbol to download Fiddler-Everywhere-\[VERSION\]-Patched. (Make sure you have WinRAR installed. If not, download it from here: [https://www.win-rar.com/start.html](https://www.win-rar.com/start.html))

![][image7]

* Create a folder and place the downloaded zip file inside of it, then right click it and press “Extract here”.


![][image8]

* Now open Fiddler Everywhere as Administrator (also, make sure you go to properties and make it always open as administrator in the compatibility settings, then press the “apply” button before closing).

![][image9]

Upon opening it for the first time, a login button will appear. Don’t worry about it, when you press it you’ll automatically login.

* Now, click the settings button.

![][image10]

* Press “Trust CA Certificate in the Machine Store”

![][image11]

When a popup appears about installing the Fiddler Root Certificate Authority, press “Yes”.

* Now your settings should look like this. Make sure “Capture HTTPS traffic” is checked and before clicking export, make sure the format is set to “PEM/ASCII Format (.pem)”.

![][image12]

* After clicking “Export”, there should be a new file in your Desktop called “Fiddler\_Root\_Certificate\_Authority.pem”. Double click it and open it with notepad (or whatever text file editor you use).

![][image13]

* The .pem file should look like this. Now copy everything by pressing Ctrl \+ A and Ctrl \+ C.

![][image14]

Now comes one of the most important steps to get Fiddler Everywhere working within Roblox Desktop Version. Right-click on the Roblox shortcut you use (preferably Bloxstrap or Fishstrap if you have them) and press "Open file location".

* After going to the file location, double click the “Versions” folder.

![][image15]

* Now, double click the “version-\[ROBLOX VERSION\]” folder.

![][image16]

* Double click the folder called “ssl”

![][image17]

Now, you should be careful with the next steps. If you do something wrong, your Roblox might not open until you reinstall it again. Make sure you make a backup of this file.

* Double click the file called “cacert.pem” and open it with your text file editor

![][image18]

* Scroll to the very end of the “cacert.pem” file.

![][image19]

* Now, make a new line and paste the entire text you have copied from the “Fiddler\_Root\_Certificate\_Authority.pem” file by pressing Ctrl \+ V. Now your “cacert.pem” should look like this:

![][image20]  
(red \= the text you’ve copied from the Fiddler\_Root\_Certificate\_Authority.pem file)

After pasting the text, make sure to save your changes by pressing Ctrl \+ S.

* We're already halfway through the steps\! Now, go to your Fiddler settings and go to the Connections tab. Make sure those options are checked just like the image below, and then press “Save”. (I'm not really sure if it's necessary, but I use these settings in my Fiddler)

![][image21]

Now we enter the final steps\! Now, we'll make the necessary changes for the subplace glitching to work.

* Close the settings tab and click “Rules”.

![][image22]

* Click “Add Rule”

![][image23]

* Now copy the first rule from the image below:

![][image24]  
Rule Name: Delay join-game POST  
When \[all these conditions\] are met \[any number of times\]

| Host | Is equal to | gamejoin.roblox.com |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| URL | Contains | /v1/join-game |
| Method | Is equal to | POST |

Actions: Delay Request  
Milliseconds: 1200 (you can adjust this if the subplace glitch doesn’t work)

After configuring the first rule, press “Save”.

* Now, add another rule and copy this second rule from the image below:

![][image25]  
Rule Name: Delay CONNECT Tunnel  
When \[all these conditions\] are met \[any number of times\]

| Host | Is equal to | gamejoin.roblox.com |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Method | Is equal to | CONNECT |

Actions: Delay Request  
Milliseconds: 1200 (you can adjust this if the subplace glitch doesn’t work)

press “Save”.

* Now, add another rule and copy this third rule from the image below:

![][image26]  
Rule Name: Force isTeleport  
When \[all these conditions\] are met \[any number of times\]

| Host | Is equal to | gamejoin.roblox.com |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| URL | Contains | /v1/join-game |
| Method | Is equal to | POST |
| Request Body | Does not contain | "isTeleport":true |

Actions: Update Request Body  
Regular expression:

| ("placeId"\\s\*:\\s\*\\d+,)(\\s\*"gameJoinAttemptId") |
| :---- |
| $1  "isTeleport": true,  "isImmersiveAdsTeleport": false, $2 |

Don’t forget to press “Save”.

* After configuring all three rules, make sure they’re activated

![][image27]

* We're almost done\! Now, click the "Open Network Capture Settings dialog" button.

![][image28]

* Click “Advanced”, check these IP Address options, type “RobloxPlayerBeta.exe” in the “Filter additionally by PID or process name”, press “Save” and then “Enable”:

![][image29]  
![][image30]

* Now, press the “Filters” button.

![][image31]

* Copy the filter from the image below and press “Apply”.

![][image32]

* Now, for the last steps, join ANY game, right-click the second session tab and press “Edit in Composer”.

![][image33]

* Click on the “Body” buttons from both POST and Response tabs:

![][image34]

* THE MOST important part for subplace glitching: change the POST Request Body to this and press the “Save” button:

![][image35]

Now every time you want to join a subplace, follow these steps:

1. Get the Universe ID of the main game:  
   [https://games.roblox.com/v1/games/multiget-place-details?placeIds=PLACEID\_HERE](https://games.roblox.com/v1/games/multiget-place-details?placeIds=PLACEID_HERE)

2. Get the Subplace IDs here:  
   [https://develop.roblox.com/v1/universes/UNIVERSEID\_HERE/places?isUniverseCreation=false\&limit=100\&sortOrder=Asc](https://develop.roblox.com/v1/universes/UNIVERSEID_HERE/places?isUniverseCreation=false&limit=100&sortOrder=Asc)

example:

![][image36]  
[https://games.roblox.com/v1/games/multiget-place-details?placeIds=183364845](https://games.roblox.com/v1/games/multiget-place-details?placeIds=183364845)

![][image37]  
[https://develop.roblox.com/v1/universes/83858907/places?isUniverseCreation=false\&limit=100\&sortOrder=Asc](https://develop.roblox.com/v1/universes/83858907/places?isUniverseCreation=false&limit=100&sortOrder=Asc)

![][image38]  
Subplace ID from Final Destiny \= 1088603468

to get the subplace link, simply paste it into [https://www.roblox.com/games/ID\_HERE/](https://www.roblox.com/games/ID_HERE/) and then open it through your web browser.

Now every time you want to join a subplace, join the main game first, paste the ID of the subplace in the placeId of the Composer POST Request Body code, press “Execute” and then send the subplace link to someone (preferably your alt account) through the Party chat and press “Join”. Here’s an example:  
![][image39]

![][image40]

![][image41]

If you did every step correctly, you’ll be able to enter the subplace without any error:

![][image42]

Remember that every time you open Fiddler Everywhere, the only steps you'll always have to repeat are the Composer POST Request Body step and sending the subplace link to the party chat. If it's the same subplace you sent in the party chat before, just press "Execute" and then “Join”.

Don’t forget to always check if Roblox updated. If it did, you’ll need to copy the whole “Fiddler\_Root\_Certificate\_Authority.pem” text again and paste it into the end of Roblox’s “cacert.pem” file.

If you switch your Roblox account, you’ll need to change the .ROBLOSECURITY cookie value in the Composer POST Request Cookies tab to the new cookie value of the account you’re currently using. (to get the cookie, simply join any game, press the “inspectors” tab and copy the new .ROBLOSECURITY value and paste it into the Composer POST Request .ROBLOSECURITY Cookie Value you saved)

![][image43]
